name: Spicy Apricot Oat Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and pumpkin pie spice into a large mixing bowl.
2. Stir in oats, apricots, and walnuts.
3. In a small bowl, combine eggs, milk, and oil; blend well.
4. Add the egg mixture to the dry ingredients and stir just until moistened.
5. Spoon batter into greased 3-inch muffin pan cups, filling each about two-thirds full.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until golden brown. Serve hot with butter and homemade jam or jelly.
